title: Assessment result (v1)
description: The structured gateway result. The host validates it before it may influence state or effects (spec 10.2). `insufficient_evidence` is the abstain path.

evidence_spans.description: Quotes the model relied on. Each is source-derived text and will be re-wrapped by the chip as a taint-preserving span.

insufficient_evidence.description: When true the model abstains; the chip emits an abstention rather than a finding.
